title: Tavern Network Essentials
description: Essential mods needed to get the most out of play.taverncraft.org!
body:
# Tavern Network Essentials Minecraft Modpack
### Introduction:
**Welcome!** to the Tavern Network Essentials Modpack, specially made to elevate your experience on the taverncraft server. This modpack combines features like real-time voice chat integration and custom texture packs designed for our server's custom items.

### Key Features:
- **Voice Chat Integration**: Seamlessly communicate with fellow players using Simple Voice Chat.
- **Custom Texture Packs**: Immerse yourself in the server's unique weapons, gear, biomes, and more!

### Server Information:
- **Server IP: play.taverncraft.org**
- **Discord community: [Discord Invite](https://discord.gg/nFEqpV8)**

### Need Assistance or Have Suggestions?
- Join our welcoming our discord linked below! We highly value your input, so please feel free to report any issues or share your ideas for improvement.

### Stay Connected:
- Follow the server runner and the coolest content creator (unbiased) IsKevin's socials:
  - YouTube: [IsKevin's Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@IsKevin)
  - Twitter: [IsKevin on Twitter](https://twitter.com/IsKevinLive)

### Credits:
- Simple Voice Chat: https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/credits
- Custom nether: https://modrinth.com/user/Stardust
- Custom end: https://modrinth.com/user/kohara
